fixture: 075_explain

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE widgets (id INTEGER NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(20), active BOOLEAN)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO widgets VALUES (1, 'alice', TRUE)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO widgets VALUES (2, 'bob', FALSE)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    CREATE VIEW active_widget_ids AS SELECT id FROM widgets WHERE active = TRUE
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 5:
  sql:
    EXPLAIN SELECT id, name FROM widgets WHERE id = 1
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] query_plan VARCHAR
    rows:
      [0] "Project(columns=[id INTEGER NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(20)])"
      [1] "  Filter(predicate=id = 1)"
      [2] "    Scan(table=public.widgets, columns=[id INTEGER NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(20), active BOOLEAN])"

statement 6:
  sql:
    EXPLAIN SELECT id FROM active_widget_ids WHERE id = 1
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] query_plan VARCHAR
    rows:
      [0] "Project(columns=[id INTEGER NOT NULL])"
      [1] "  Filter(predicate=id = 1)"
      [2] "    Scan(table=public.active_widget_ids, columns=[id INTEGER NOT NULL])"

statement 7:
  sql:
    EXPLAIN (SELECT id FROM widgets UNION ALL SELECT id FROM widgets)
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] query_plan VARCHAR
    rows:
      [0] "SetOp(operator=UNION, quantifier=ALL)"
      [1] "  Project(columns=[id INTEGER NOT NULL])"
      [2] "    Scan(table=public.widgets, columns=[id INTEGER NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(20), active BOOLEAN])"
      [3] "  Project(columns=[id INTEGER NOT NULL])"
      [4] "    Scan(table=public.widgets, columns=[id INTEGER NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(20), active BOOLEAN])"

statement 8:
  sql:
    EXPLAIN ANALYZE SELECT id FROM widgets
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 0A000] at 1:1 (offset 0): EXPLAIN ANALYZE is not supported
